audit_items.proof_trace: The formula P(t) = startingPriceMultiplier - floor((startingPriceMultiplier - endingPriceMultiplier) * elapsedTime / auctionDuration) is mathematically monotonically non-increasing: since (start - end) >= 0 (enforced by StartingPriceMultiplierLowerThanEndingPriceMultiplier check at line 653) and floor preserves weak ordering, P(t1) >= P(t2) for t1 < t2. Config-time guards enforce auctionDuration > 0 (line 647) and params are frozen during active auctions (LiveAuction check at line 628), so the invariant holds across the full auction lifecycle.
